description: App-owned workflow.research prompt rendered JSON output.

assert.value: let trimmed = output.trim(); const fenced = trimmed.match(/^```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```$/i); if (fenced) trimmed = fenced[1].trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); data.status === 'research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.dimensions_selected) && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections)
